introSection: X-treme Coaster is a steel indoor roller coaster located at X-Site in Muntinlupa, Metro Manila, Philippines. X-Site is located on the third floor of the Festival Supermall.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Painted with blue track spine, yellow track ties and silver running rails and supports.

fullText:
X-treme Coaster is a steel indoor roller coaster located at X-Site in Muntinlupa, Metro Manila, Philippines. X-Site is located on the third floor of the Festival Supermall.

Painted with blue track spine, yellow track ties and silver running rails and supports.
